data.description: Poland, as part of an exchange with Belarus, has released Russian historian Butyagin, who was due to be extradited to Ukraine, announced Sikorski.

data.title: Commvault Announces Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Commvault, a company based in Tinton Falls, N.J., announced that it successfully met all fourth-quarter and fiscal 2026 performance metrics. Notably, they achieved a record $132 million in free cash flow during the fourth quarter. The total reported Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) saw a 21% year-over-year growth, including $44 million in net new ARR when adjusted for currency fluctuations. This achievement signifies strong financial performance by Commvault.

data.title: Hope Bancorp Reports Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In Los Angeles, Hope Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOPE) announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The Company, which is the parent company of Bank of Hope, reported a net income of $29.5 million, equivalent to $0.23 per diluted common share. This marked a 40% increase from the previous year's net income of $21.1 million, or $0.17 per diluted common share for the same period. However, there was a 14% decrease from the preceding quarter's earnings.

data.title: Alan Draper Named Chief Executive Officer of Nippon Sanso Matheson
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Nippon Sanso Matheson, Inc. revealed that Alan Draper has taken on the position of Chief Executive Officer starting from April 1, 2026. With thirty years of experience in the industry, Draper is set to oversee Nippon Sanso Matheson's U.S.-based operations, encompassing a vast network of 300+ sites across the country and more than 40 air separation units catering to clients nationwide. His appointment comes after an extensive international career in the industrial gases sector spanning nearly 30 years.

data.title: Artist Kris Andrew Small adds flair to Leonardo's Sydney HQ with vibrant murals and installations, sparking creativity. (Read More)
data.description: Kris Andrew Small, an artist, has recently revamped Leonardo's Sydney headquarters by incorporating vibrant murals and engaging installations. His work aims to celebrate the essence of creativity by embracing a bold and chaotic approach. This transformation has attracted significant attention, with an increasing number of visitors admiring Small's unique artistic vision.

data.title: Nexera: KeepZone AI Receives Official Authorization to Introduce Advanced Fuel Tank Structural Survivability System in the Gulf Region
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel - In a recent update, Nexera Technologies Ltd, formerly known as Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, disclosed that its wholly-owned subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc., obtained an official Authorization from a provider of protective infrastructure solutions. The Authorization allows KeepZone to introduce and represent the Provider’s advanced composite structural survivability system designed for fuel storage tanks and critical energy infrastructure. The collaboration will target select clients in the Gulf region. Nexera, listed on Nasdaq as NEXR and NEXRW, focuses on expanding into the global homeland security sector using AI-driven solutions, marking a significant step towards diversification.

data.title: Anthropic sets up Sydney office, led by Theo Hourmouzis, focusing on driving AI growth in ANZ with strategic collaborations.
data.description: Anthropic, a leading AI company, is expanding its operations to Sydney with Theo Hourmouzis at the helm to oversee activities in Australia and New Zealand. This move aims to boost AI adoption in the region through strategic partnerships. The expansion is expected to significantly contribute to the growth of AI technology in ANZ, with Hourmouzis playing a crucial role in driving this initiative.

data.title: Israel greenlights first shekel-pegged stablecoin, BILS, after two-year pilot program, a major step in crypto regulation.
data.description: Israel's regulatory body has given its approval for BILS, a stablecoin pegged to the shekel. This decision comes after a successful two-year pilot program and signifies a significant step forward in regulating cryptocurrencies. This move is important as stablecoins have grown in popularity and are often used as a store of value and medium of exchange in the crypto market. This milestone indicates a growing acceptance and integration of digital assets into the traditional financial system.

data.title: OKX allows institutions to use BlackRock's BUIDL fund as trading collateral, integrated into Standard Chartered custody.
data.description: The integration of BlackRock’s tokenized Treasury fund into Standard Chartered custody has been completed by OKX. This development enables institutions to utilize the fund as regulated trading collateral. This move facilitates easier access to the fund for trading purposes.

data.title: Soluna and Sazmining Announce 3 MW Bitcoin Mining Operation at Project Dorothy 1B
data.description: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol SLNH, has revealed a new partnership with Sazmining in the field of green data centers for advanced computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence. This collaboration will assist in establishing Sazmining's second U.S. mining operation, starting with an initial deployment of 3 MW at Soluna's Project Dorothy 1B. The partnership is poised to expand in the future, pending further developments.

data.title: Cross Country Healthcare Marks 40 Years, Accelerates Next Generation of Workforce Intelligence and Orchestration
data.description: Cross Country Healthcare is celebrating its 40th anniversary by enhancing its workforce intelligence and orchestration through expanded artificial intelligence and predictive analytics. This initiative aims to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the company's operations.

data.title: Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Appoints Joseph Tucker, Ph.D., to Board of Directors
data.description: A recent board appointment has bolstered the expertise of Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Inc. This addition brings in a seasoned biotech executive, aimed at enhancing the company's capabilities following its recent direct listing on Nasdaq as LABT. As a clinical-stage biotechnology company, Lakewood-Amedex is focused on advancing a unique class of treatments. The development took place in Sarasota, Florida, on April 28, 2026.
